_naming: Landing showcase slugs (12) — featured in locations.json + collection.json. Full catalog via cardgen rounds later.
_showcase: Regenerate text: npm run generate-showcase -- --project=iyashikei --force. Art only: npm run generate-images-showcase -- --project=iyashikei

cards.title: Kodama Keeper

ability.name: Shrine Mending
ability.text: Taunt. Regenerate 1. When this unit blocks, restore 1 Health to your player.

cards.notes: soft moss greens, cedar forest shrine light
cards.image_prompt: A gentle kodama forest spirit tending a mossy shrine lantern, soft iyashikei anime trading card art, watercolor style, cedar forest komorebi light, peaceful guardian mood

cards.title: Fern Sage

ability.name: Verdant Counsel
ability.text: Regenerate 2. Give an allied unit +2 Health.

cards.image_prompt: An elderly forest sage with ferns and tea bowl, iyashikei watercolor card art, soft green palette, tranquil woodland clearing

cards.title: Mosswalker

ability.name: Silent Path
ability.text: Stealth until this unit attacks. Deal 2 damage to a damaged enemy unit.

cards.image_prompt: A lithe moss-covered woodland scout slipping along a cedar footpath, iyashikei anime card art, stealthy but calm, no violence

cards.title: Tide Listener

ability.name: Still Water
ability.text: Freeze an enemy unit until end of turn. Draw a card if you played another Naminami card this turn.

cards.notes: calm inlet at dawn, sea mist blues
cards.image_prompt: A serene tide listener kneeling by calm inlet water with shell pendant, iyashikei watercolor card art, dawn coastal palette, reflective mood

cards.title: Pearl Diver

ability.name: Tidal Gift
ability.text: Stealth until this unit attacks. When this unit enters play, gain 1 credit.

cards.image_prompt: A young pearl diver on a weathered pier at morning tide, iyashikei anime card art, gentle coastal village mood

cards.title: Coral Whisper

ability.name: Reef Lullaby
ability.text: Charm. Redirect an enemy unit's next attack. Restore 2 Health to an allied unit.

cards.image_prompt: A coral spirit whispering over tide pools and sea glass, iyashikei watercolor card art, pale blue and shell white tones

cards.title: Lantern Tender

ability.name: Warm Glow
ability.text: Ward. Give an allied unit Ward until end of turn.

cards.image_prompt: A lantern tender lighting paper lanterns along a harvest village lane at dusk, iyashikei anime card art, warm amber palette

cards.title: Embersmith

ability.name: Hearth Spark
ability.text: Siege. Deal 1 damage to the enemy player at the end of your turn.

cards.notes: village forge at golden hour, cozy not violent
cards.image_prompt: A gentle embersmith at a countryside hearth forge, golden hour light, iyashikei watercolor card art, warm copper tones

cards.title: Festival Dancer

ability.name: Summer Step
ability.text: Charge. Other friendly units gain +1 Attack this turn.

cards.notes: summer festival, paper fans and lanterns
cards.image_prompt: A festival dancer with paper fan under lantern glow, iyashikei anime card art, joyful but peaceful summer evening

cards.title: Breeze Shepherd

ability.name: Highland Gust
ability.text: Flying. Regenerate 1. Give a friendly Flying unit +1 Health.

cards.image_prompt: A breeze shepherd with wind chime staff on a highland ridge, iyashikei watercolor card art, open sky and wildflowers

cards.title: Cloud Reader

ability.name: Sky Omen
ability.text: Ranged. Look at the top card of your deck. You may draw it or discard it.

cards.image_prompt: A cloud reader on a meadow hill studying drifting clouds, iyashikei anime card art, airy highland palette

cards.title: Summit Guide

ability.name: Mountain Rest
ability.text: Taunt. Allied units behind this unit take 1 less damage from spells.

cards.image_prompt: A summit guide with travel pack beside wind chime shrine steps, iyashikei watercolor card art, peaceful mountain vista
